title: 2026 Oscar Best Cinematography Predictions - Gold Derby
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony will take place on March 15 on ABC, honoring films released during 2025. The Best Cinematography category features five nominees, ranked by Gold Derby odds combining expert, editor, and user predictions. Sinners - Autumn Durald Arkapaw (51.54% odds): Distributed by Warner Bros. and directed by Ryan Coogler, this film stars Michael B. Jordan and Hailee Steinfeld. One Battle After Another - Michael Bauman (24.91% odds): A Paul Thomas Anderson film featuring Leonardo DiCaprio and Sean Penn. Train Dreams - Adolpho Veloso (22.66% odds): This Netflix adaptation stars Joel Edgerton and depicts a logger and railroad worker navigating early 20th-century America. Frankenstein - Dan Laustsen (0.73% odds): Guillermo del Toro's Netflix production features Oscar Isaac and Jacob Elordi. Marty Supreme - Darius Khondji (0.16% odds): An A24 film by Josh Safdie starring Timothée Chalamet.
